column3: "Ephedra improves respiratory function" refers to its ability to enhance breathing by aiding airflow and reducing inflammation in the respiratory system.
"Ephedra boosts energy levels" refers to its ability to enhance a person's physical endurance and mental alertness, typically through its stimulating components.
"Ephedra helps to relieve nasal congestion" refers to its ability to reduce stuffiness and ease breathing during upper respiratory issues or sinus problems.
"Ephedra aids in weight loss" refers to its ability to help people lose extra pounds by increasing metabolism or assisting fat burning.
"Ephedra reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and discomfort caused by certain conditions.
"Ephedra promotes mental clarity" refers to its ability to aid a person's concentration and focus, making them feel mentally clear.
"Ephedra enhances athletic performance" refers to its ability to improve physical endurance and speed by using certain chemical substances found within it.
"Ephedra supports immune function" refers to its ability to boost or enhance a person's immunity, helping them stay healthy and fight off illnesses more effectively.
"Ephedra improves digestion" refers to its ability to enhance the process of breaking down food substances by improving organ functions that play a key role in digestion.
"Ephedra alleviates allergy symptoms" refers to its ability to reduce or ease the discomforts experienced during allergic reactions.
